meta.title: 健康生活方式
meta.description: Intermediate healthy lifestyle vocabulary and grammar in Chinese: routine, diet, immunity, and conditional patterns.
meta.description_ko: 중국어 초중급~중급 건강한 생활방식 어휘와 문형: 생활 리듬, 식습관, 면역력, 조건 구문.

explanation.en: 「作息规律」(zuòxī guīlǜ) means "regular daily schedule/routine".
explanation.ko: 「作息规律」(zuòxī guīlǜ)는 '규칙적인 생활 리듬'을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「作息规律」是什么意思？(What does 作息规律 mean?)

explanation.ko: 「均衡饮食」(jūnhéng yǐnshí)는 '균형 잡힌 식습관'을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「均衡饮食」是什么意思？(What does 均衡饮食 mean?)

explanation.en: 「亚健康」(yàjiànkāng) means "sub-health", a state between health and illness.
explanation.ko: 「亚健康」(yàjiànkāng)는 건강과 질병 사이의 '준건강' 상태를 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「亚健康」是什么意思？(What does 亚健康 mean?)
「免疫力」是什么意思？(What does 免疫力 mean?)
「熬夜」是什么意思？(What does 熬夜 mean?)
保持___对身体健康非常重要，不要经常熬夜。(Maintaining a regular schedule is very important for physical health, don't stay up late often.)
医生建议我保持___，多吃蔬菜水果。(The doctor recommended I maintain a balanced diet, eat more vegetables and fruits.)
长期压力过大会导致___，需要及时调整。(Long-term excessive stress can lead to a sub-healthy state, needs timely adjustment.)
适当运动可以增强身体的___。(Moderate exercise can strengthen the body's immunity.)
我最近经常___，第二天总是很疲惫。(I've been staying up late a lot recently, always feel exhausted the next day.)
只要坚持锻炼，___能改善身体状况。(As long as you persist with exercise, you can improve your physical condition.)

explanation.en: 「规律」(guīlǜ) here as an adjective means "regular".

questions.prompt: 越___的生活方式，越有利于长期健康。(The more regular the lifestyle, the more beneficial it is for long-term health.)
除了运动___，睡眠质量也会影响免疫力。(Besides exercise, sleep quality also affects immunity.)
这种___饮食方式对减肥没有长期效果，反而伤害身体。(This kind of extreme diet method has no long-term effect for weight loss, and actually harms the body.)
研究表明，久坐不动会___慢性疾病的风险。(Research shows that sitting for long periods increases the risk of chronic diseases.)
适量的运动加上健康的饮食，才能真正___健康。(Moderate exercise plus a healthy diet can truly maintain health.)
现代人的生活压力越来越大，___健康的生活方式变得尤为重要。(Modern people's life stress is increasing, making a healthy lifestyle even more important.)
很多年轻人因为熬夜和不良饮食习惯，早早地就出现了各种健康___。(Many young people, due to staying up late and poor eating habits, developed various health problems early on.)
我打算从下个月开始，___改变自己的生活习惯。(I plan to start changing my lifestyle habits from next month.)

explanation.en: 「缺少」(quēshǎo) means "to lack"; 不可缺少 = "indispensable".
explanation.ko: 「缺少」(quēshǎo)는 '부족하다'라는 뜻이며 '不可缺少'는 '없어서는 안 될'이라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 良好的心态也是健康生活方式不可___的一部分。(A positive mindset is also an indispensable part of a healthy lifestyle.)

explanation.en: 「多吃」(eat more) must come before its object 蔬菜水果 (vegetables and fruits) as a separate clause after the comma: 保持均衡饮食，多吃蔬菜水果 (not 均衡饮食多吃，蔬菜水果 with the comma misplaced).
explanation.ko: 「多吃」는 쉼표 뒤 별도의 절로 목적어 '蔬菜水果' 앞에 와야 하므로 '保持均衡饮食，多吃蔬菜水果'가 맞다.

questions.prompt: 保持作息规律对身体健康非常重要，不要经常熬夜。 — this is correct, use another sentence: 医生建议我保持均衡饮食多吃，蔬菜水果。(The doctor recommended I maintain a balanced diet, eat more vegetables and fruits.) — find the error
choices: 医生建议我保持均衡饮食，多吃蔬菜水果。
医生建议我保持均衡饮食多吃，蔬菜水果。
医生建议我保持多吃均衡饮食，蔬菜水果。
医生建议我均衡饮食保持，多吃蔬菜水果。

explanation.en: 「就」must come before 能 (can): 就能改善 (not 能就改善).
explanation.ko: 「就」는 '能' 앞에 와야 하므로 '就能改善'이 맞다.

questions.prompt: 只要坚持锻炼，能就改善身体状况。(As long as you persist with exercise, you can improve your physical condition.) — find the error
choices: 只要坚持锻炼，就能改善身体状况。
只要坚持锻炼，能就改善身体状况。
只要坚持锻炼，就改善能身体状况。
只要坚持锻炼，能改善就身体状况。

explanation.en: 「总是」(always) must come after the time word 第二天 (the next day): 第二天总是 (not 总是第二天).
explanation.ko: 「总是」는 시간어 '第二天' 뒤에 와야 하므로 '第二天总是'가 맞다.

questions.prompt: 我最近经常熬夜，总是第二天很疲惫。(I've been staying up late a lot recently, always feel exhausted the next day.) — find the error
choices: 我最近经常熬夜，第二天总是很疲惫。
我最近经常熬夜，总是第二天很疲惫。
我最近经常熬夜，第二天很总是疲惫。
我最近经常熬夜，很疲惫第二天总是。

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 医生建议我保持均衡饮食，多吃蔬菜水果 ("The doctor recommended I maintain a balanced diet, eat more vegetables and fruits").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '医生建议我保持均衡饮食，多吃蔬菜水果' (의사는 균형 잡힌 식단을 유지하고 채소와 과일을 많이 먹으라고 권했다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 医生建议我保持均衡饮食，__________。(The doctor recommended I maintain a balanced diet, eat more vegetables and fruits.)

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 只要坚持锻炼，就能改善身体状况 ("As long as you persist with exercise, you can improve your physical condition").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '只要坚持锻炼，就能改善身体状况' (꾸준히 운동하기만 하면 몸 상태를 개선할 수 있다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 只要坚持锻炼，__________。(As long as you persist with exercise, you can improve your physical condition.)
